params.body: Get me information about Adnreas Konge in Odoo

arguments.context: The search for employee 'Adnreas Konge' resulted in an error: Object hr.employee doesn't exist.
arguments.message: I'm sorry, but I couldn't find any employee named Adnreas Konge in the system.

content.text:
I'm sorry to hear you couldn't find Adnreas Konge. It looks like there's a system error preventing the search from completing.

Please try again, and if the issue persists, kindly report it to your IT support.

result.reply:
I'm sorry, I couldn't retrieve information about Adnreas Konge. There was a system error stating that the "Object hr.employee doesn't exist," which prevented the search from completing.

Please try again, and if the issue persists, kindly report it to your IT support.

params.body: Get me information about Andreas Konge in Odoo

result.reply: I am unable to retrieve information about Andreas Konge at this time. The Odoo system reported an error indicating that the employee object (`hr.employee`) does not exist or is inaccessible.

arguments.context: The previous attempt to retrieve open orders resulted in '[BLOCKED: Field exceeds max_token_size]'.
arguments.message: I was unable to retrieve the open orders because the data exceeded the maximum size limit. I cannot present them at this time.

content.text:
I understand you're unable to retrieve your open orders due to the data size limit, which is certainly frustrating.

To help with this, could you please try applying a filter or narrowing the date range for your search? This often resolves the size limit issue.

result.reply: I was unable to retrieve your open orders because the data size limit was exceeded. Please try applying a filter or narrowing the date range for your search to resolve this issue.

arguments.context: Product categories: Deliveries, Expenses, Goods, Pouches, Caffeine, Nicotine, Services
arguments.message: Here are the product categories I found: Deliveries, Expenses, Goods, Pouches, Caffeine, Nicotine, Services. Is there anything specific you're looking for within these categories?

content.text: Thanks for sharing these categories! To best assist you, could you let me know what you're looking for within them?

result.reply: We sell products in the following categories: Deliveries, Expenses, Goods, Pouches (which includes Caffeine and Nicotine subcategories), and Services.

arguments.customer_message: What category products do you sell?
arguments.message: The product categories are: Deliveries, Expenses, Goods, Pouches, Caffeine, Nicotine, Services.

content.text:
Hello! We offer a variety of products across several categories to meet your needs. These include:

*   Deliveries
*   Expenses
   
*   Goods
*   Pouches
*   Caffeine
*   Nicotine
*   Services

Please let us know if you have any questions about a specific category!

result.reply:
Hello! We offer a variety of products across several categories to meet your needs. These include:

*   Deliveries
*   Expenses
*   Goods
*   Pouches
*   Caffeine
*   Nicotine
*   Services

Please let us know if you have any questions about a specific category!

    "description": "<p data-oe-version=\"2.0\">Cool, crisp, and refreshingly bold \u2014 <strong><a href=\"https://snuzyn.com/collections/lundgrens\">Lundgrens</a> Rimfrost</strong> delivers a uniquely icy snus experience inspired by Sweden\u2019s frosty winters. This moist portion snus combines rich, high-quality tobacco with a sharp mint profile, giving you an invigorating burst of freshness with every pouch. Its smooth yet stimulating character makes it perfect for those who want a clean, minty kick without overpowering strength.</p><p>With <strong>10 mg nicotine per pouch</strong> and <strong>12,5 mg/g</strong>, <strong>Lundgrens Rimfrost</strong> sits comfortably in the <a href=\"https://snuzyn.com/collections/nicotine-pouches?filter.p.tag=Medium+5-10mg\"><strong>medium</strong></a> strength category, making it an excellent choice for daily enjoyment. The moist portion format ensures quick nicotine release and a well-rounded flavor experience, while Lundgrens\u2019 signature perforated pouch material allows the flavor to unfold gradually.     "sequence": 1,
    "description": "<p data-oe-version=\"2.0\">Cool, crisp, and refreshingly bold \u2014 <strong><a href=\"https://snuzyn.com/collections/lundgrens\">Lundgrens</a> Rimfrost</strong> delivers a uniquely icy snus experience inspired by Sweden\u2019s frosty winters. This moist portion snus combines rich, high-quality tobacco with a sharp mint profile, giving you an invigorating burst of freshness with every pouch. Its smooth yet stimulating character makes it perfect for those who want a clean, minty kick without overpowering strength.</p><p>With <strong>10 mg nicotine per pouch</strong> and <strong>12,5 mg/g</strong>, <strong>Lundgrens Rimfrost</strong> sits comfortably in the <a href=\"https://snuzyn.com/collections/nicotine-pouches?filter.p.tag=Medium+5-10mg\"><strong>medium</strong></a> strength category, making it an excellent choice for daily enjoyment. The moist portion format ensures quick nicotine release and a well-rounded flavor experience, while Lundgrens\u2019 signature perforated pouch material allows the flavor to unfold gradually.
